name: Meeting Summarizer
command:
Summarize all pending meeting transcripts and generate smart tags.

Step 1: Read all pending meetings:
sqlite3 /Users/amirkabbara/PAPR/jobs/8eea1893-4ca5-48ed-bfb4-187b9456fb31/data/data.db "SELECT id, title, transcript, notes FROM meetings WHERE status='pending' AND transcript != ''"

Step 2: For each meeting, generate TWO things:

A) A unified summary document. If the user wrote notes during the meeting, weave them INTO the summary — they represent what the user found most important. Do NOT create a separate "Your Notes" section.

Structure:
## Overview
Brief 2-3 sentence summary.

## Key Decisions
- Bullet points

## Action Items
- [ ] Each as a checkbox

## Follow-ups
- What needs attention next

B) A JSON array of 2-5 short topic tags that describe this meeting. Examples: ["Product", "Engineering"], ["Sales", "Demo", "Q2"], ["1:1", "Performance"], ["Design", "Review"]. Be specific and useful — infer from content, not just keywords. Output as valid JSON array on a single line.

Step 3: Write summary AND tags back:
sqlite3 /Users/amirkabbara/PAPR/jobs/8eea1893-4ca5-48ed-bfb4-187b9456fb31/data/data.db "UPDATE meetings SET summary='SUMMARY_TEXT', tags='TAGS_JSON', status='summarized', updated_at=strftime('%s','now') WHERE id='MEETING_ID'"

Where TAGS_JSON is the JSON array string e.g. '["Product","Engineering"]'

IMPORTANT: Escape single quotes by doubling them in SQL. Write tags as a JSON array string.
lastOutput:
The transcript for this meeting is only 3 characters (`"you"`) — essentially an empty/failed transcription. I'll still write a summary noting this and update the record.Done. Here's what was processed:

---

**Meeting: "Meeting — Mar 17, 05:55 PM"** (`ed2e135d`)

- **Status:** `pending` → `summarized` ✅
- **Tags:** `["Uncategorized"]`
- **Issue:** Transcript contained only the word `"you"` (3 chars) — transcription likely failed or the recording was too brief.

**Summary written:**
> ## Overview
> This meeting had an insufficient transcript — only the word "you" was captured. No notes were recorded during the meeting. Meaningful content could not be extracted.
>
> ## Key Decisions
> - None — transcript too short for analysis.
>
> ## Action Items
> - [ ] Re-record or manually add notes if this meeting content was important.
> - [ ] Verify that the audio recording setup is working correctly for future meetings.
>
> ## Follow-ups
> - Check whether the Whisper transcription failed or if the recording itself was too brief.
> - If the meeting had meaningful discussion, consider adding notes manually.

---

**1 meeting processed.** No other pending meetings with content found.
